message:
Add toolchain failure detection for graceful local fallback

Add infrastructure to detect toolchain-related failures during remote
execution and enable fallback to local compilation:

RemoteExecutionResult Struct:
- Captures both exit_code and stderr from remote execution
- Allows inspecting stderr for error categorization

is_toolchain_failure() Function:
- Detects common toolchain failure patterns in stderr output
- Patterns: "toolchain", "is not installed", "rustup: command not found",
  "rustup: not found", "error: no such command", "error: toolchain"
- Case-insensitive matching for robustness
- Only triggers on non-zero exit codes

This enables the fail-open philosophy: when remote toolchain sync fails,
the hook can detect the failure category and allow local execution
rather than blocking the agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
